# terrible_dellemc_openmanage_ome_groups (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description for the device group. This is applicable only when *state* is `present`.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `group_id` (String) ID of the device group to be created, modified, or deleted. If *state* is absent, multiple IDs can be provided. This option is mutually exclusive with *name*.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `name` (String) Name of the device group to be created, modified, or deleted. If *state* is absent, multiple names can be provided. This option is case insensitive. This option is mutually exclusive with *group_id*.
- `new_name` (String) New name for the existing device group. This is applicable only when *state* is `present`.
- `parent_group_id` (Number) ID of the parent device group under which the device group to be created or modified. This is applicable only when *state* is `present`. This option is mutually exclusive with *parent_group_name*.
- `parent_group_name` (String) Name of the parent device group under which the device group to be created or modified. This is applicable only when *state* is `present`. `NOTE` If device group with such a name does not exist, device group with *parent_group_name* is created. This option is case insensitive. This option is mutually exclusive with *parent_group_id*.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) `present` allows to create or modify a device group. `absent` allows to delete a device group.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `error_info` (String) Details of the HTTP Error.
- `group_ids` (String) List of the deleted device group IDs.
- `group_status` (String) Details of the device group operation status.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `invalid_groups` (String) List of the invalid device group IDs or names.
- `msg` (String) Overall status of the device group operation.
